chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-547 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 20-06-2023 Mr. Irshad Ali Khoso, advocate for applicants along with applicant, who are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Ms. Safa Hisbani A.P.G. Sindh. MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J: - Complainant claims to be watchman and according to him when he was present at the otaque of Mr. Atta Muhammad Talpur situated in Dabharo within the jurisdiction of PS Talhar, on 08.04.2023 at about 03.00 p.m., applicants armed with pistols and hatchets approached him and started firing upon him to cause his and PWs murder, however, they were able to rescue themselves by jumping in a water-pond on which applicants also made firing but without hitting the target. Next date complainant appeared at PS and registered FIR. 2. Learned defense counsel states that only ineffective firing is attributed to the applicants and in view of previous enmity between them false implication cannot be ruled out. Learned A.P.G. has half heartedly opposed bail. 3. Applicability of section 324 PPC in view of ineffective firing attributed to the applicants is yet to be determined in the trial. False implication of the applicants in view of abnormal relations between the parties cannot be ruled out either. Hence, bail application is allowed and interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicants is confirmed on the same terms and conditions as laid down in the earlier order dated 31.05.2023. 4. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits.

Hence, bail application is allowed and interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicants is confirmed on the same terms and conditions as laid down in the earlier order dated 31.05.2023. 4. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
